briefs.title: Development Charge Instalment Rules Grandfathered for Developers Who Paid Before Jan 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its rules for how developers pay development charges (fees charged by local governments when new buildings are approved) in instalments. Developers who chose the instalment payment option and made their first payment before January 1, 2026 will continue to follow the old payment rules — the new rules do not apply to them.
briefs.action_required: If you paid a development charge instalment before Jan 1, 2026, confirm with your municipality you are on the old payment schedule.
